author: smuzaffar
body:
New mplhep version does not have `mplhep.cms.lumitext`. One option is to use `hep.cms.label` but that might have slightly adjusts spacing and alignment . This PR proposes to use `hep.lumitext` which should keep the spacing and alignment unchanged

[a]
```
hep.cms.label(
    CMS_Text,
    lumi=lumitext,
    com=None,
    ax=ax,
    fontsize=CMS_Text_Size
)
```
title: Changes needed for mplhep 1.1.0 use  hep.lumitext instead of  hep.cms.lumitext
